title: Idempotency key derivation from request bytes with epoch binding

checks.name: sdk_verifier_clippy_blocker_removed
checks.command: rustfmt --edition 2024 sdk/verifier/src/bundle.rs sdk/verifier/src/capsule.rs sdk/verifier/src/lib.rs && git diff --check -- sdk/verifier/src/bundle.rs sdk/verifier/src/capsule.rs sdk/verifier/src/lib.rs
checks.note: Removed verifier SDK -D warnings blockers that prevented the bd-12n3 clippy proof from reaching dependency compilation.

checks.name: cargo_check_all_targets_via_rch
checks.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_VISIBILITY=summary RCH_PRIORITY=low RCH_TEST_TIMEOUT_SEC=1800 RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=2400 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/franken_node-rusticplateau-bd-177e4-check-target CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 cargo +nightly-2026-02-19 check -p frankenengine-node --all-targets
checks.note: RusticPlateau recorded this remote pass in the bd-177e4 Beads thread at 2026-05-05 16:04 UTC: [RCH] remote vmi1293453 (803.3s). The persisted artifact log for this check remains the 2026-05-03 stale dependency failure and must be refreshed before bd-177e4 can close cleanly.

checks.name: cargo_clippy_all_targets_via_rch
checks.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_VISIBILITY=summary RCH_PRIORITY=low RCH_TEST_TIMEOUT_SEC=1800 RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=2400 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/franken_node-pinkfern-bd-177e4-clippy-target CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 cargo +nightly-2026-02-19 clippy -p frankenengine-node --all-targets -- -D warnings
checks.note: PinkFern refreshed this proof on 2026-05-05. The stale sqlmodel open_with_page_size blocker is gone; clippy reaches frankenengine-node on remote ts2 and fails with 187 warning-as-error errors across existing all-target warning debt. First blockers include engine_dispatcher.rs unused variables/functions, rollout_state.rs dead code, divergence_gate.rs dead constants, cli.rs doc-lazy-continuation, and config.rs needless-borrow warnings.

checks.name: focused_idempotency_tests_via_rch

The persisted artifact log for this focused test remains the 2026-05-03 stale dependency failure and must be refreshed before bd-177e4 can close cleanly.

remaining_blocker.message: cargo +nightly-2026-02-19 clippy -p frankenengine-node --all-targets -- -D warnings reaches frankenengine-node and fails with 187 warning-as-error errors; fresh persisted cargo check and focused-test pass logs are still needed before bd-177e4 closeout.
